title: Device Settings - Settings screen for disconnected device
scenario: Device Settings "..." menu does not show Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, and Delete Device tabs when headset is disconnected
steps: Tap on a previously paired device that is currently disconnected
Tap the "..." (More Options) button on the Device Settings screen
Observe the list of settings tabs displayed
expected: The settings tabs should include Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, and Delete Device. Available tabs may vary slightly between different device models.
